creator: unixmania@gmail.com
text:
After discussing this subject with Robert Noland we agree that making
it a menu option is not convenient. The alternate patch below adds a
non-interactive WITHOUT_XCB knob. It also removes the explicit
dependencies on libXau and libXdmcp when XCB is enabled, since libxcb
already depends on them.

I'm posting it b64encode-ed because GNATS fails to recognize the
attacments I send via GMail. Extract it with
b64decode.

begin-base64 644 libX11.patch
